name: quadrantica
short_description: In quadrantica your task is to find the correct sequence of moves to unify a field of pillars.  Your moves are limited, so think ahead.
detailed_description:
Cerebral Division LLC Shutting Down

Hello,

Thank you to everybody who has played this game. I have shut down the Cerebral Division LLC, since it has been dormant for the past couple of years. It was created only to publish this game, and the way it was set up no longer aligns with my plans for the future. I'm a solo developer so there were no layoffs or anything like that, I'm just closing the legal entity and delisting this from the store so that no new purchases can be made for now.

Everybody who has purchased the game will continue to be able to download and play it. It will not disappear from anybody's libraries. Once a new company has been created I will be able to transfer the game to that entity and make it available again.

Until then, thanks again!


About the Game

quadrantica

In quadrantica your task is to find the correct sequence of moves to unify a field of pillars.
 Your moves are limited, so think ahead.

Game Features

  • 81 puzzles in 9 levels
  • A half-hour soundtrack of original music
  • No time limits or lives - these puzzles take time

Game Controls


- ( left click ) trigger block
- ( right click ) switch power
- ( "R" key ) reset field
- ( ESC key ) open menu
